overview: Kimi K2 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K2 line. Released 2025-07-11. Moonshot's flagship open-weight 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model line (32B active) for agentic chat and coding.
What's notable in this version: Original 1T-parameter MoE (32B active) released open-weight as Kimi-K2-Base and Kimi-K2-Instruct under a Modified MIT license; strong coding/math benchmarks.
